title: T-040 — Barcode lookup endpoints (LP / location / validate)
prompt:
# T-040 — Barcode lookup endpoints

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §13.2 (FR-WH-026).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Three route handlers used by Scanner: lookup LP by barcode, lookup location by barcode, validate any barcode (returns type + decoded). SLO <200ms P95.

## Implementation contract
Files:
- `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/lp/[barcode]/route.ts`
- `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/location/[barcode]/route.ts`
- `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/validate-barcode/route.ts`
Auto-detect prefix LP, GS1-128 (use T-023 parser to extract embedded SSCC/LP), or location code. Validate-barcode returns {type: 'lp'|'location'|'gs1', decoded}. Tenant RLS applies. Reject unknown barcodes with 404 + structured reason.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/lp/[barcode]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/location/[barcode]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/validate-barcode/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/__tests__/lookup.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given GET /lookup/lp/LP00000123, when LP exists, then 200 with LP info; when missing, 404 with reason 'lp_not_found'.
2. Given GET /lookup/location/A.B3, when location exists, then 200 with ltree path; when not, 404 with reason 'location_not_found'.
3. Given POST /validate-barcode with body '(01)05012345678900', when called, then response.type='gs1' and decoded.gtin='05012345678900'.

## Test strategy
- RED: lookup.test.ts covers three endpoints with hit/miss scenarios.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-lookup`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow cross-tenant lookups.
- Do not throw on parse errors — return 404 with reason.
- Do not exceed 200ms P95 — log if slower.
